jasperReport.name: classic_landscape
jasperReport.queryString: select e.Cconcepto as Concepto, c.Cdescripcion as DescripcionConcepto, e.Edocumento as Documento, convert(varchar,e.Efecha,103) as Fecha, e.Eperiodo as Periodo, e.Emes as Mes, e.ECauxiliar as Auxiliar, e.ECusuario as Usuario, d.Dlinea as Linea, d.Ddocumento as DDocumento, d.Ddescripcion as Descripcion, d.Dreferencia as Referencia, cf.CFformato as Cuenta, o.Odescripcion as Oficina, e.Oorigen, coalesce(d.Doriginal, 0) as Monto, m.Msimbolo as Moneda, coalesce(d.Dtipocambio, 1) as TipoCambio, --- Formatear a 4 decimales case when Dmovimiento = 'D' then d.Dlocal else 0.00 end as Debitos, case when Dmovimiento = 'C' then d.Dlocal else 0.00 end as Creditos, convert(varchar,getdate(), 103) || ' ' || convert(varchar,getdate(),108) as fecha_hora, $P{Edesc} as Edescripcion from HEContables e left join Oficinas o on o.Ecodigo = e.Ecodigo and o.Ocodigo = e.Ocodigo inner join HDContables d on d.IDcontable = e.IDcontable inner join ConceptoContableE c on c.Ecodigo = e.Ecodigo and c.Cconcepto = e.Cconcepto inner join CFinanciera cf on cf.CFcuenta = d.CFcuenta inner join Monedas m on m.Mcodigo = d.Mcodigo where e.Ecodigo = $P{Ecodigo} and e.Eperiodo >= $P{PeriodoIni} and e.Eperiodo <= $P{PeriodoFin} and ((e.Eperiodo * 100 + e.Emes) between ($P{PeriodoIni} * 100 + $P{MesIni}) and ($P{PeriodoFin} * 100 + $P{MesFin})) and (upper(rtrim(ltrim(e.ECusuario))) = upper(rtrim(ltrim($P{UsuarioOrigen}))) or upper($P{UsuarioOrigen}) = 'TODOS') and (e.Ocodigo = $P{OficinaOrigen} or $P{OficinaOrigen} = -1) and e.Efecha between isnull(convert(datetime,$P{fechaini},103),e.Efecha) and isnull(convert(datetime,$P{fechafin},103),e.Efecha) and e.Cconcepto between $P{CconceptoIni} and $P{CconceptoFin} and (upper(rtrim(ltrim(e.Oorigen))) = upper(rtrim(ltrim($P{Origen}))) or $P{Origen} = '-1') order by e.Eperiodo, e.Emes, e.Cconcepto, e.Edocumento, d.Dlinea
